title: TitanForge
description: TitanForge is a new level of optimization on Client-side
body:
A new level of Optimization.

TitanForge modpack adds new, essential and functional things to the game, what make your minecraft better, by:
1. Optimizing your game
2. Adding functions (Ping, Chat, Distant Horizons, Dyn. Crosshair, ReplayMod, and others)

The modpack provides things that make your life easier, like AuthMe, AntiGhost, Eating Animation.
